Container.Name: Librarian
Container.Overview: Librarian — audiobook automation. Search Audible's catalog, grab releases through Prowlarr, download with qBittorrent, and auto-import finished books into AudioBookShelf as Author/Title. Multi-user with TOTP two-factor auth, mobile-first web UI. Built as a locally-built image (librarian:latest) — rebuild with docker build after updating the source.
Container.Requires: Image must be built locally first: docker build -t librarian:latest /mnt/user/appdata/librarian-src

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Librarian web interface.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Librarian settings, users, and download history.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: MUST point at the same host folder qBittorrent downloads into (whatever share qBittorrent's downloads folder maps to). Librarian reads finished downloads from here.

Config.Name: Audiobook Library
Config.Description: MUST point at the same host folder your AudioBookShelf library uses. Imported books are placed here as Author/Title.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: File owner for imported books (99 = nobody, unraid default).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: File group for imported books (100 = users, unraid default).
